3 = Beneficiary met claims criteria and had sufficient FFS coverage 

COMMENT: The CCW’s other chronic or potentially disabling condition variables require enrollees to satisfy both 
claims criteria (a minimum number/type of Medicare claims that have the proper diagnosis codes and 
occurred within a specified time period) and coverage criteria (Medicare FFS Part A and Part B 
coverage during the entire specified time period).
